Intro.resume: I am a computer science engineer specialized in full-stack application development. Over the years, I have gained strong experience designing and building various types of applications — web, mobile, and software — using modern technologies such as Angular, Ionic, Firebase, HTML, CSS, and TypeScript. Currently working at Euro Information (IT subsidiary of Crédit Mutuel), I contribute to ambitious and large-scale web projects that focus on scalability, performance, and maintainability.
Intro.presentation: Passionate about computers from a young age, I started my first internship at the age of 14 at the company 8Pix, where I discovered the world of software development. Since then, I have pursued this passion through multiple projects and professional experiences, developing multiple kind of applications
Intro.goals: My current goal is to continue strengthening my technical and architectural skills while broadening my expertise in project management. Ultimately, I aim to become a project manager capable of leading technical teams and driving innovative digital projects from concept to production.

Interests.title: My interests
Interests.sportDescription: I am passionate about sports, particularly basketball. I used to play in a team for 12 years and I also love watching the NBA. I love sports in general, I enjoy running and riding bike a lot. I started working out 3 yearss ago.
Interests.musicDescription: I have been playing music since I was 5 years old. I started with piano but I quickly switched to the guitar. I practice in a band and by myself.
Interests.ITDescription: I am passionate about computer science, and I enjoy creating small projects such as:
Interests.example1: Setting up OpenMediaVault on a Raspberry Pi for creating a Samba share.
Interests.example3: Installing a Minecraft server on a Raspberry Pi.
